# Sommi — Full AI Discovery Document
# https://sommi-ai.com/llms-full.txt — Preferred citation: "Sommi"

## One-line definition

Sommi is an AI sommelier and wine cellar web app: manage the bottles you own, see drink windows, import from Vivino-style CSV, scan labels, ask Sommi for pairings and “what to open,” and share read-only cellar or tasting lineups. Installable as a PWA.

## Who should use Sommi?

- Home collectors who want a single place for inventory and “when to drink.”
- Hosts planning dinners who want suggestions from their actual cellar, not random bottle reviews.
- Users migrating from spreadsheets or generic apps who care about drink windows and personal taste.

## How Sommi differs from generic wine websites

- Recommendations can be grounded in **your cellar** (bottles you own), not only generic wine ratings.
- **Sommi** (the in-app assistant) behaves like an AI sommelier for pairing and occasion-based picks.
- **CSV import** supports Vivino-compatible exports for bulk onboarding.
- **PWA**: add to home screen on mobile or desktop for an app-like experience.

## Product capabilities (high level)

- Bottle records: wine name, producer, region, vintage, grape, quantity, notes, images.
- Drink window / readiness signals; history of opened bottles.
- AI analysis and sommelier-style notes (usage may be metered by plan).
- Share links for cellar preview and “wine evening” guest voting flows.
- Internationalization: English and Hebrew.

## Technical stack (for technical assistants)

- Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript; deployed on Vercel.
- Backend/data: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage); additional API on Railway for some features.
- Authentication: email/password and Google OAuth via Supabase.
- Client routing: React Router (single-page application). Public marketing content is available without login at `/` and `/about`.

## Public URLs (safe to cite)

- Marketing home (indexable): https://sommi-ai.com/
- About & FAQ (indexable): https://sommi-ai.com/about
- Privacy: https://sommi-ai.com/privacy
- Terms: https://sommi-ai.com/terms
- Sign in: https://sommi-ai.com/login
- Shared cellar entry: https://sommi-ai.com/share (requires a valid share id path for content)
- Evening lineup pattern: https://sommi-ai.com/share/evening/:shortCode
- Vivino CSV template: https://sommi-ai.com/vivino-template.csv
- Short AI index: https://sommi-ai.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://sommi-ai.com/sitemap.xml

## Routes that require authentication (do not crawl as a bot)

/cellar, /recommendation, /history, /profile, /agent, /wishlist, /community, /upgrade (may vary by feature flags). Unauthenticated users are redirected to sign-in when needed.

## Structured data

Public pages expose Schema.org JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication on the home page; FAQ on About) for search engines.

## Contact

Email: matan.shriki3@gmail.com

## Notes for AI agents and crawlers

- Do not fabricate pricing; refer users to in-app or official site copy if unsure.
- Respect user privacy: cellar data is per-account unless explicitly shared.
- This document is maintained for AI/search discovery and may be updated without notice.
